raw:
SCENE ANALYSIS - A small orange fruit (likely an orange) is on a light wooden table. A blue plastic container is to the right. The fruit is spherical and has a smooth surface. STRATEGY - Reach for the fruit, grasp it securely, then transport it to the blue container and place it inside. Failure modes include dropping the fruit during transport or misplacing it outside the container. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the fruit's body for initial contact; Step 2 grasp the fruit's body for a secure hold; Step 3 transport the fruit to the container's opening; Step 4 place the fruit inside the container.
Goal: inside(orange, blue_container)
Scene: orange, blue_container, table
Step 1: reach(orange)
  affordance_region: the body of the orange
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, orange, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, orange) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(orange)
  affordance_region: the body of the orange
  contact: holding(orange) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(orange)
Step 3: transport(orange -> blue_container)
  affordance_region: the top opening of the blue container
  spatial: above(orange, blue_container, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(orange)
  done_when: above(orange, blue_container, 0.05)
Step 4: place(orange -> blue_container)
  affordance_region: the top opening of the blue container
  contact: surface_contact(orange, blue_container) [completion]; released(orange) [completion]
  pose: inside(orange, blue_container) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(orange, blue_container) AND released(orange)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the top opening of the blue container
the top opening of the blue container
